rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types in comparisons
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Remove range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports unless the requirement and AADL data representation provide a numeric scalar
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;` for range comparisons
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions in component type annexes when referring to component ports
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
